physics_rules.temp_vs_DO: At temperature T (°C), max dissolved O2 solubility = 14.62 - (0.3898 * T) + (0.006969 * T^2) - (0.00005896 * T^3). If reported DO exceeds this, sensor is FAULTY.
physics_rules.rain_vs_turbidity: If rainfall > 5mm/hr, turbidity must increase within 20 minutes. If turbidity stays flat, sensor is SUSPICIOUS.
physics_rules.ammonia_vs_pH: High ammonia (>1.5 ppm) and high pH (>8.0) cannot coexist normally. If both are high simultaneously, flag as cross-sensor conflict.
physics_rules.DO_vs_time_of_night: Between 01:00 and 06:00 with no aeration, dissolved O2 must trend downward due to zero photosynthesis. A spike in this window is physically impossible.
physics_rules.temp_daily_swing: Water temperature cannot change more than 3°C in any 30-minute window naturally. Larger swings indicate sensor fault.
